# About This Repository

**Author:** VladiMIR Bulantsev (GinCz) — [github.com/GinCz](https://github.com/GinCz)  
**Location:** Czech Republic  
**Keywords:** VladiMIR Bulantsev · GinCz · Windows scripts · CMD · BAT · batch scripting · system optimization · SMB network drives · Samba · IPGuard · XRAY VPN · CrowdSec · Ubuntu 24 · Linux server · sysadmin · DevOps · Czech Republic · benchmarking · diagnostics

This repository contains Windows CMD/BAT utility scripts for system optimization, diagnostics, benchmarking, software installation, and Samba SMB network drive management.

The SMB infrastructure (10-node Samba servers on Ubuntu 24 LTS, secured with IPGuard + CrowdSec + XRAY VPN) is documented at ➡️ [GinCz/Linux_Server_Public](https://github.com/GinCz/Linux_Server_Public).

See [README.md](../README.md) for full documentation.
